name: Guildford Athletics Track
metaTitle: Guildford Athletics Track | Spectrum Track Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Guildford Athletics Track at the Guildford Spectrum leisure complex.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Availability depends on club bookings and events. Managed by Freedom Leisure; check the Guildford Spectrum website for updated daily public track times.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go track sessions are available for visitors. Contact the centre or check online for current rates and membership options.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A high-quality 8-lane 400m synthetic track with full field event facilities, home to many regional competitions and clubs.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: 1,000 free car parking spaces are available on-site at Guildford Spectrum, including parent/toddler and accessible bays.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Guildford Spectrum, Parkway, Guildford, Surrey, GU1 1UP

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Guildford Spectrum website for track timetables, booking info, and facility updates.
